subcodes.first_line: Mention of the Days of Tribulation hath been made in the Tablet of Constancy, wherein God hath forewarned all peoples of a mighty test in His sublime and glorious Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر ایام شداد در لوح سداد شده حق جمیع را بفتنه عظیمه در الواح بدیعه منیعه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @predictions and prophecies, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
